content.headline: Claim Your Exclusive Reward Today
content.subtitle: Complete the next step to check your eligibility and unlock today's exclusive reward.
content.heroCardCopy: Minimal distractions, transparent messaging, and a focused CTA create a conversion-friendly journey.
content.benefitsDescription: Every section is designed to feel calm, credible, and conversion-oriented without misleading visitors.
content.featuresDescription: From the sticky navigation to the supporting policy pages, every element is built to guide visitors forward.
content.stepsDescription: A concise journey that helps visitors understand what happens next without feeling rushed or confused.
content.testimonialsDescription: Designed for modern promotional campaigns that value clarity, speed, and compliance.

testimonials.quote: The experience feels premium without being overbuilt. It is calm, clear, and simple to navigate.
testimonials.author: Mira Chen, Growth Strategist

testimonials.quote: The messaging is direct and trustworthy. The page gets the point across in seconds.
testimonials.author: Daniel Ortiz, Product Lead

testimonials.quote: The experience behaves beautifully on mobile and desktop, which matters for every campaign.
testimonials.author: Nina Patel, Marketing Director

content.faqDescription: Helpful information built into the page to reduce hesitation and improve clarity.

features.title: Reach your selected offer in just a few simple steps.
Your navigation is protected with a safe and reliable process.

faq.question: Yes. We use a secure connection to protect your experience.
Most users complete the process in just a few minutes.
3. Do I need to pay anything?
No. Simply follow the instructions provided on the next page.

content.privacyText: We respect your privacy. Any information collected is used only to provide and improve your experience. Your data is handled securely and is never sold to third parties.
content.termsText: By using this website, you agree to comply with our Terms of Use. Availability of offers may vary based on eligibility, location, and advertiser requirements. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice.
content.ctaTitle: Ready to direct visitors with confidence?
content.ctaCopy: Use the dashboard to update branding, content, tracking, and the destination URL in one place.

seo.title: BOUHAJ Rewards
seo.description: Complete a quick verification to check your eligibility and unlock today's exclusive reward. Fast, secure, and designed for a smooth experience.
seo.keywords: reward, rewards, exclusive reward, gift, special offer, limited offer, secure rewards, online rewards, promotional offer, reward center

security.csp: default-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; script-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'none'
